calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:47am
Judge Pro Tem Guy Kornblum, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Yenisei Adelantar appears in Pro Per with her insurance claims adjuster. Respondent, Sharon Lew appears in Pro Per with a witness. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Kornblum.

Evidence is handed to Judge Kornblum by both parties, but nothing is marked.

10:07am

Matter is submitted.

Request To Set Aside Dismissal.
Off Calendar May-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed
